calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judith Tang for Andrew Colvin and Susan May.

Ms. Tang acknowledged that her clients distributed funds without prior approval from the court. The Court informed Ms. Tang that despite her clients being the sole beneficiaries, they are not allowed to make any distributions without a court order. Ms. Tang was directed to inform her clients of the same. The Court provided counsel with a copy of the Duties and Liabilities of a Personal Representative signed by her clients. The Court stated that the rest of the Petition looks to be in order. The Accounting Petition was granted (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy J. Chen.
